message:
Apply code formatting and style consistency improvements

Refines formatting across core-types, scheduler, content-index, and
core-serialization to improve readability and align with Rust idioms.

Changes
-------
**core-types (ultrasearch/crates/core-types/src/lib.rs)**

~ bitflags macro invocation
  - use bitflags::bitflags; → bitflags::bitflags! { ... }
  Inlines macro invocation for clarity; removes top-level import.

+ FileFlags derives
  #[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, Serialize, Deserialize)]
  Adds Debug, Clone, Copy for better ergonomics in tests and logging.

~ FileMeta indentation
  Fixed struct indentation (was extra-indented).

~ ext extraction formatting
  ```rust
  let ext = name
      .rsplit_once('.')
      .map(|(_, ext)| ext.to_ascii_lowercase());
  ```
  Multi-line formatting for clarity.

**scheduler (ultrasearch/crates/scheduler/src/lib.rs)**

~ SystemLoadSampler::sample() formatting
  Multi-line formatting for long expressions:
  ```rust
  let dt = now
      .saturating_duration_since(self.last_sample)
      .max(Duration::from_millis(1));
  ```

~ disk_busy calculation
  ```rust
  let disk_busy =
      read_bps >= self.disk_busy_threshold || write_bps >= self.disk_busy_threshold;
  ```

~ disk_totals() tuple formatting
  ```rust
  (
      r_acc + d.total_read_bytes(),
      w_acc + d.total_written_bytes(),
  )
  ```

~ select_jobs() formatting
  Aligned multi-line boolean expressions for allow_content guard.

~ idle_elapsed_ms() import order
  Moved GetTickCount before GetLastInputInfo for consistency.

**content-index (ultrasearch/crates/content-index/src/lib.rs)**

~ Import reordering
  ```rust
  use tantivy::{Index, IndexWriter, ReloadPolicy, schema::*};
  ```
  Alphabetical order within tantivy re-export.

**core-serialization (ultrasearch/crates/core-serialization/src/lib.rs)**

~ Multi-line formatting for test assertions and function calls
  Improved readability in tests.

Rationale
---------
These changes have no semantic effect but improve:
- Readability: Long expressions split across lines at logical boundaries
- Searchability: Consistent formatting aids code navigation
- Review quality: Diffs show intent more clearly
- CI hygiene: Prepares for automated rustfmt enforcement

The bitflags! macro change avoids unused import warnings when features
conditionally disable FileFlags usage.

FileFlags derives enable #[derive(Debug)] on structs containing FileFlags,
which was previously blocked.

Related
-------
- §c00.1.2 manifest cleanup (rustfmt policy pending)
- PLAN progress log (RedSnow crate-local cleanup)
- .cargo/config.toml: no rustfmt config yet; manual for now
